name: Stonewall Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Stonewall Resort in Roanoke, WV! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
